snippet.title: Chevron CEO Michael Wirth Talks Oil Supply | Bloomberg Talks
snippet.description:
Chevron chairman and CEO Michael Wirth says he sees oil reaching $100 dollars a barrel as worldwide supplies tighten. He speaks with hosts Alix Steel and Guy Johnson.

See omnystudio.com/listener (https://omnystudio.com/listener) for privacy information.

snippet.title: Breaking Boundaries: The Unconventional Strategies of Chevron's CEO, Michael Wirth
snippet.description: Welcome to our video about Michael Wirth, the CEO of Chevron, one of the world's largest and most successful energy companies. Michael Wirth has been at the helm of Chevron since 2018, and in that time, he has established himself as a leader who is driving innovation and sustainability in the energy industry. In this video, we will explore the career history of Michael Wirth, from his early days as an engineer to his rise as CEO. We will also examine his mindset, principles, and key factors that he brings to Chevron. Finally, we will look at his influence on the industry and how he is shaping the future of energy. So, sit back, relax, and let's dive into the fascinating world of Michael Wirth and the energy industry.
